purpose: Grand Duo chair BLE command dictionary and UI source of truth.

state_feedback.description: 34-byte state snapshot emitted by the chair.

session_bootstrap.description: Observed tablet startup burst; used automatically before control traffic.

f100_general.description: Main single-action control family for programs, modes, presets, therapy, pause, timing, and many add-ons.

f101_upper_or_heating.description: Observed in upper 4D strength and roller heat commands.

fcdc_ai_custom.notes: Trailing bytes appear to encode heat, regional air, and roller subsettings.

power.name: power_on
power.label: Power On
power.effect: Causes power-on chime / wake-related behavior; does not always fully reset current session.

massage_modes.name: gentle
massage_modes.label: Gentle
evidence: ChairAiMassageLog shows F100204161 clustered with Mild and Strong mode selections.

body_scan_and_health.name: health_test_stop
body_scan_and_health.label: Health Stop
body_scan_and_health.effect: Stops or exits the health test workflow.

body_scan_and_health.name: ai_recommendation
body_scan_and_health.label: AI Recommendation
body_scan_and_health.effect: Triggers Health Recommendation from the health workflow; the chair then chooses an appropriate existing massage program.
body_scan_and_health.notes: Observed in the health menu. Treat this as a recommendation trigger, not as a fixed hidden massage program.

air_pressure.name: air_pressure_0
air_pressure.label: Air Pressure Off (Experimental)
air_pressure.effect: Experimental candidate for setting air pressure to 0 / airbags off from the universal pressure family.
air_pressure.notes: Not capture-backed yet. Added as a cautious ordinal extension of the observed air pressure 1-5 family.

rollers_non_ai.name: foot_rollers_0
rollers_non_ai.label: Rollers Off
rollers_non_ai.effect: Turns the generic/non-AI rollers off. In ManualLower this matches the foot roller family off packet.
rollers_non_ai.notes: ManualLower generic rollers off and manual foot roller off used the same packet.

rollers_non_ai.name: foot_rollers_1
rollers_non_ai.label: Rollers 1
rollers_non_ai.effect: Sets the generic/non-AI roller level to 1. In ManualLower this matches the foot roller family.

rollers_non_ai.name: foot_rollers_2
rollers_non_ai.label: Rollers 2
rollers_non_ai.effect: Sets the generic/non-AI roller level to 2. In ManualLower this matches the foot roller family.

session_time.name: session_time_10
session_time.label: 10 Minutes
session_time.effect: Sets remaining session time to 10 minutes.

session_time.name: session_time_20
session_time.label: 20 Minutes
session_time.effect: Sets remaining session time to 20 minutes.

session_time.name: session_time_30
session_time.label: 30 Minutes
session_time.effect: Sets remaining session time to 30 minutes.

lower_4d_strength.name: lower_4d_1
lower_4d_strength.label: Lower 4D 1
lower_4d_strength.notes: Adjusted to match family progression; prior mapping did not work in app testing.

ai_massage_profiles.name: ai_upper_kneading
ai_massage_profiles.label: AI Upper Kneading
ai_massage_profiles.effect: AI/custom profile focused on upper kneading.

ai_massage_profiles.name: ai_mid_upper_kneading
ai_massage_profiles.label: AI Mid Upper Kneading
ai_massage_profiles.effect: AI/custom profile focused on mid-upper kneading.

ai_massage_profiles.name: ai_mid_lower_kneading
ai_massage_profiles.label: AI Mid Lower Kneading
ai_massage_profiles.effect: AI/custom profile focused on mid-lower kneading.

ai_massage_profiles.name: ai_lower_kneading
ai_massage_profiles.label: AI Lower Kneading
ai_massage_profiles.effect: AI/custom profile focused on lower kneading.

ai_massage_profiles.name: ai_mixed_profile
ai_massage_profiles.label: AI Mixed Profile
ai_massage_profiles.effect: Mixed-profile AI/custom program with region-specific styles.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_foot_rollers_1
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Foot Rollers 1
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: AI custom foot rollers level 1; observed to require leg/foot air enabled.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_foot_rollers_2
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Foot Rollers 2
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: AI custom foot rollers level 2; observed to require leg/foot air enabled.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_calf_rollers_1
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Calf Rollers 1
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: AI custom calf rollers level 1; observed to require leg/foot air enabled.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_calf_rollers_2
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Calf Rollers 2
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: AI custom calf rollers level 2; observed to require leg/foot air enabled.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_all_off
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: All Off
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with all heat surfaces off.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_calf_only
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: Calf Only
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with calf heat surface enabled.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_foot_only
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: Foot Only
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with foot heat surface enabled.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_shawl_calf
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: Shawl + Calf
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with shawl and calf heat surfaces enabled.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_shawl_foot
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: Shawl + Foot
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with shawl and foot heat surfaces enabled.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

ai_addons_and_tuning.name: ai_heat_mask_all_on
ai_addons_and_tuning.label: AI Heat Mask: All On
ai_addons_and_tuning.effect: Observed AI custom state with all four heat surfaces enabled.
ai_addons_and_tuning.notes: FinalCap capture-backed. Treat as an AI heat surface mask state, not a universal heat command.

leg_rest_motion.name: leg_rest_up_start
leg_rest_motion.label: Leg Rest Up (hold start)
leg_rest_motion.effect: Starts leg-rest upward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.
leg_rest_motion.notes: Use in timed macros: start, wait, stop.

leg_rest_motion.name: leg_rest_down_start
leg_rest_motion.label: Leg Rest Down (hold start)
leg_rest_motion.effect: Starts leg-rest downward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.

leg_rest_motion.name: leg_rest_stop
leg_rest_motion.label: Leg Rest Stop / Release
leg_rest_motion.effect: Stops leg-rest motion / release after hold movement.
leg_rest_motion.notes: Corrected semantics; older scripts mislabeled this as legs down preset.

back_rest_motion.name: back_rest_up_start
back_rest_motion.label: Back Rest Up (hold start)
back_rest_motion.effect: Starts back-rest upward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.

back_rest_motion.name: back_rest_down_start
back_rest_motion.label: Back Rest Down (hold start)
back_rest_motion.effect: Starts back-rest downward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.

back_rest_motion.name: back_rest_stop
back_rest_motion.label: Back Rest Stop / Release
back_rest_motion.effect: Stops back-rest motion / release after hold movement.

foot_rest_motion.name: foot_rest_down_start
foot_rest_motion.label: Foot Rest Out (hold start)
foot_rest_motion.effect: Starts foot-rest outward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.
foot_rest_motion.notes: TimedPass2 note called this foot down, but motion corresponds to foot out.

foot_rest_motion.name: foot_rest_up_start
foot_rest_motion.label: Foot Rest In (hold start)
foot_rest_motion.effect: Starts foot-rest inward motion; continue until stop/release or mechanical limit.
foot_rest_motion.notes: TimedPass2 note called this foot up, but motion corresponds to foot in.

foot_rest_motion.name: foot_rest_stop
foot_rest_motion.label: Foot Rest Stop
foot_rest_motion.effect: Stops foot-rest motion / release after hold movement.

manual_upper_modes.name: manual_upper_knead_tap
manual_upper_modes.label: Manual Upper: Knead + Tap
manual_upper_modes.effect: Sets the upper manual massage mode to knead + tap.

manual_upper_modes.name: manual_upper_shiatsu
manual_upper_modes.label: Manual Upper: Shiatsu
manual_upper_modes.effect: Sets the upper manual massage mode to shiatsu.

manual_upper_modes.name: manual_upper_tap
manual_upper_modes.label: Manual Upper: Tap
manual_upper_modes.effect: Sets the upper manual massage mode to tap.

manual_upper_modes.name: manual_upper_knock
manual_upper_modes.label: Manual Upper: Knock
manual_upper_modes.effect: Sets the upper manual massage mode to knock.

manual_upper_modes.name: manual_upper_knead
manual_upper_modes.label: Manual Upper: Knead
manual_upper_modes.effect: Sets the upper manual massage mode to knead.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_whole
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position: Whole
manual_upper_position.effect: Switches the upper manual cursor to whole mode.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_partial
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position: Partial
manual_upper_position.effect: Switches the upper manual cursor to partial mode.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_point
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position: Point
manual_upper_position.effect: Switches the upper manual cursor to point mode.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_move_up_start
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position Up (hold start)
manual_upper_position.effect: Moves the upper manual cursor upward until stopped.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_move_down_start
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position Down (hold start)
manual_upper_position.effect: Moves the upper manual cursor downward until stopped.

manual_upper_position.name: manual_upper_move_stop
manual_upper_position.label: Manual Upper Position Stop / Release
manual_upper_position.effect: Stops the upper manual cursor movement.

manual_air_regions.name: manual_air_full
manual_air_regions.label: Manual Air: Full
manual_air_regions.effect: Routes manual air pressure to full body.

manual_air_regions.name: manual_air_arm_shoulder
manual_air_regions.label: Manual Air: Arm / Shoulder
manual_air_regions.effect: Routes manual air pressure to arm / shoulder.

manual_air_regions.name: manual_air_waist_seat
manual_air_regions.label: Manual Air: Waist / Seat
manual_air_regions.effect: Routes manual air pressure to waist / seat.

manual_air_regions.name: manual_air_leg_foot
manual_air_regions.label: Manual Air: Leg / Foot
manual_air_regions.effect: Routes manual air pressure to leg / foot.

manual_lower_mechanism.name: manual_lower_knead_tap
manual_lower_mechanism.label: Manual Lower Mechanism: Knead + Tap
manual_lower_mechanism.effect: Sets the lower mechanism to knead + tap in manual mode.

manual_lower_mechanism.name: manual_lower_knead
manual_lower_mechanism.label: Manual Lower Mechanism: Knead
manual_lower_mechanism.effect: Sets the lower mechanism to knead in manual mode.

manual_lower_mechanism.name: manual_lower_knock
manual_lower_mechanism.label: Manual Lower Mechanism: Knock
manual_lower_mechanism.effect: Sets the lower mechanism to knock in manual mode.

manual_lower_mechanism.name: manual_lower_shiatsu
manual_lower_mechanism.label: Manual Lower Mechanism: Shiatsu
manual_lower_mechanism.effect: Sets the lower mechanism to shiatsu in manual mode.

manual_lower_mechanism.name: manual_lower_tap
manual_lower_mechanism.label: Manual Lower Mechanism: Tap
manual_lower_mechanism.effect: Sets the lower mechanism to tap in manual mode.

program_point_massage.name: point_massage_neck_stretch
program_point_massage.label: Point Massage: Neck Stretch
program_point_massage.effect: Starts Point Massage / Neck Stretch program.

program_point_massage.name: point_massage_spinal_care
program_point_massage.label: Point Massage: Spinal Care
program_point_massage.effect: Starts Point Massage / Spinal Care program.

program_point_massage.name: point_massage_waist_glutes
program_point_massage.label: Point Massage: Waist and Glutes
program_point_massage.effect: Starts Point Massage / Waist and Glutes program.

program_point_massage.name: point_massage_leg_foot
program_point_massage.label: Point Massage: Leg and Foot
program_point_massage.effect: Starts Point Massage / Leg and Foot program.

program_focused.name: focused_neck_shoulder
program_focused.label: Focused: Neck and Shoulder
program_focused.effect: Starts Focused / Neck and Shoulder program.

program_focused.name: focused_upper_body
program_focused.label: Focused: Upper Body
evidence: TimedPass2 annotates the Focused / Upper Body step and matches F100002727.

program_focused.name: focused_lower_body
program_focused.label: Focused: Lower Body
evidence: TimedPass2 annotates the Focused / Lower Body step and matches F100002828.

program_sports_recovery.name: sports_upper_body
program_sports_recovery.label: Sports Recovery: Upper Body
program_sports_recovery.effect: Starts Sports Recovery / Upper Body program.

program_sports_recovery.name: sports_fatigue_relief
program_sports_recovery.label: Sports Recovery: Fatigue Relief
program_sports_recovery.effect: Starts Sports Recovery / Fatigue Relief program.

program_sports_recovery.name: sports_lower_body_relax
program_sports_recovery.label: Sports Recovery: Lower Body Relax
program_sports_recovery.effect: Starts Sports Recovery / Lower Body Relax program.

program_full_body.name: full_body_quick_demo
program_full_body.label: Full Body: Quick Demo
program_full_body.effect: Starts Full Body / Quick Demo program.

auxiliary_tablet_navigation.name: tablet_nav_up_or_step_a
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.label: Tablet Nav Up / Step A
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.effect: Observed only in tablet-side navigation before later chair actions; no direct chair motion was isolated from this packet alone.
evidence: TimedPass2 groups this family under the screen-navigation sequence noted as up/down/ok with no direct chair movement.

auxiliary_tablet_navigation.name: tablet_nav_down_or_step_b
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.label: Tablet Nav Down / Step B
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.effect: Observed only in tablet-side navigation before later chair actions; no direct chair motion was isolated from this packet alone.
evidence: TimedPass2 groups this family under the screen-navigation sequence noted as up/down/ok with no direct chair movement.

auxiliary_tablet_navigation.name: tablet_nav_confirm_or_release
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.label: Tablet Nav Confirm / Release
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.effect: Observed interleaved with the tablet-side navigation packets above; treated as confirm/release-style auxiliary navigation until a cleaner isolated capture proves more.
evidence: Appears repeatedly between the other navigation packets in TimedPass2 and Chair Tablet Session.

auxiliary_tablet_navigation.name: tablet_context_transition
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.label: Tablet Context Transition
auxiliary_tablet_navigation.effect: Observed as a tablet-side context/screen transition before later chair actions. A direct standalone chair effect is not yet isolated from the uploaded captures.
evidence: Observed in Chair Tablet Session and PauseChangeProgram immediately before subsequent state changes.

manual_lower_speed.name: manual_lower_speed_1
manual_lower_speed.label: Manual Lower Speed 1
manual_lower_speed.effect: Sets manual lower mechanism speed to 1.

manual_lower_speed.name: manual_lower_speed_2
manual_lower_speed.label: Manual Lower Speed 2
manual_lower_speed.effect: Sets manual lower mechanism speed to 2.

manual_lower_speed.name: manual_lower_speed_3
manual_lower_speed.label: Manual Lower Speed 3
manual_lower_speed.effect: Sets manual lower mechanism speed to 3.

manual_lower_speed.name: manual_lower_speed_4
manual_lower_speed.label: Manual Lower Speed 4
manual_lower_speed.effect: Sets manual lower mechanism speed to 4.

manual_lower_speed.name: manual_lower_speed_5
manual_lower_speed.label: Manual Lower Speed 5
manual_lower_speed.effect: Sets manual lower mechanism speed to 5.

manual_lower_position.name: manual_lower_whole
manual_lower_position.label: Manual Lower Position: Whole
manual_lower_position.effect: Switches the lower manual cursor to whole mode.

manual_lower_position.name: manual_lower_partial
manual_lower_position.label: Manual Lower Position: Partial
manual_lower_position.effect: Switches the lower manual cursor to partial mode.

manual_lower_position.name: manual_lower_point
manual_lower_position.label: Manual Lower Position: Point
manual_lower_position.effect: Switches the lower manual cursor to point mode.

manual_lower_position_motion.name: manual_lower_move_up_start
manual_lower_position_motion.label: Manual Lower Position Up (hold start)
manual_lower_position_motion.effect: Moves the lower manual cursor upward until stopped.
manual_lower_position_motion.notes: ManualLower capture-backed; parity matches upper track family.

manual_lower_position_motion.name: manual_lower_move_down_start
manual_lower_position_motion.label: Manual Lower Position Down (hold start)
manual_lower_position_motion.effect: Moves the lower manual cursor downward until stopped.
manual_lower_position_motion.notes: ManualLower capture-backed; parity matches upper track family.

manual_lower_position_motion.name: manual_lower_move_stop
manual_lower_position_motion.label: Manual Lower Position Stop / Release
manual_lower_position_motion.effect: Stops the lower manual cursor movement.
manual_lower_position_motion.notes: ManualLower capture-backed; parity matches upper track family.

notes: Phase19 adds timer 10 minutes, experimental air-pressure-off, and AI heat surface mask controls.
Manual air Off in the UI now sends the experimental air_pressure_0 candidate packet F100006F6F.
Heat levels remain universal chair controls; AI heat surface selection is treated as an experimental FCDC mask.
